name: test-coverage
description: Improve test coverage for a module with meaningful, behavior-driven tests

parameters.name: module
parameters.description: Module or directory to improve test coverage for

parameters.name: test_command
parameters.description: Command to run tests (defaults to 'pnpm run test')

team.name: test-engineer
team.role: Test engineer — writes meaningful, behavior-driven tests that catch real bugs

tasks.title: Audit test coverage for {{module}}
tasks.description: Analyze the existing test coverage for {{module}}. Identify: (1) untested code paths, (2) edge cases without tests, (3) critical business logic lacking assertions, (4) areas where tests exist but are shallow. Write findings to coverage-audit.md with specific file:line references and priority ranking.

expectations.criteria: The audit identifies specific untested code paths and prioritizes them by risk

tasks.title: Write tests for {{module}}
tasks.description: Based on the coverage audit, write new tests for {{module}} targeting {{target_coverage}}% coverage. Focus on: (1) behavior, not implementation, (2) edge cases and error paths, (3) integration between components. Use descriptive test names that explain what's being tested.

expectations.criteria: Tests are meaningful, test behavior not implementation, cover edge cases, and have descriptive names
